changes.before: Not close enough to join the talk, close enough to matter.
Not building a new chain. Slipping bad grain into the one already there and letting the wagons do the rest.
changes.after: They're using the kingdom's own grain roads, slipping bad grain into the one already there and letting the wagons do the rest.

changes.before: Sylvanas showed him her commission and let the silence do the rest until he stepped aside.
changes.after: Sylvanas showed him her commission and waited until he stepped aside.

changes.before: Heavy man, grey in his beard, dead long enough for the stillness to have settled all the way through him.
changes.after: Heavy man, grey in his beard, dead long enough to be still all the way through.

changes.before: The King's Road sees too much traffic.
changes.after: Too much traffic uses the King's Road.

changes.before: the sort of local knowledge that let him pass for harmless
changes.after: enough local knowledge to pass for harmless

changes.before: She had only marked the road they were already riding toward.
changes.after: She had only chosen the road they were already riding toward.

changes.before: They had not been inside ten minutes before Sylvanas knew somebody had been ahead of them. The books were too clean.
changes.after: The books were too clean. ... Somebody had been ahead of them.

changes.before: The next morning the enemy showed its hand.
changes.after: Millbrook Spur sat dead quiet when they rode in.

changes.before: "Quiet necromancy." Jaina kept her voice low.
The miss sat badly because of its size.
The next morning the enemy showed its hand.
changes.after: Millbrook Spur sat dead quiet when they rode in.

changes.before: Something for a quick search. Something meant to be found clean.
changes.after: Decoy books, left where a fast search would stop.
